reason: This configuration addresses the long-tail problem within Aves by using focal_g2.0, which is designed to focus on hard-to-classify, rare species (Finding 2). We switch to mixup augmentation to synthesize multi-label examples, directly simulating the high density of simultaneous species observed in the test soundscapes (Finding 4). Finally, we use a moderate geographic weighting (1000km) to aggressively prioritize the Pantanal data while allowing some global context, addressing the geographic domain shift (Finding 5).
